description: Environment mode (development|production). Controls static file serving vs Vite middleware.
Express server listening port. Dev default: 8383. Prod default: 8383 (overridden by env var to 8282 in docker-compose & npm scuttle:prod-start). Parsed as integer.
production_override: PORT=8282 (set by docker-compose.yml and npm scuttle:prod-start, enables single unified server for both API and static files)

description: Allowed CORS origin for Express. Default: http://localhost:8282 (Vite frontend dev port).
Frontend API endpoint (injected at build time by Vite define). Leave unset for relative URLs (recommended for production). Set to http://localhost:8383 for local dev (Vite proxy).
prod_value: unset (defaults to empty string, enables relative /api/* calls)

description: Google Gemini API key. Used by the AI service on the frontend via Vite define injection.
